name: box
description: Browse, search, and organize files and folders in Box cloud storage

envVars.name: BOX_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Box OAuth Client ID (from your Custom App in the Developer Console)

tools.name: List Folder Items
tools.description: List files and subfolders inside a Box folder (folder 0 is the root)

folderId.description: Box folder ID ('0' is the root folder)

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

fields.description: Comma-separated attribute list to include, e.g. id,type,name,size,modified_at

historicalSummary.omitted: file metadata, shared links, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get File
tools.description: Get metadata about a Box file

tools.name: Get Folder
tools.description: Get metadata about a Box folder

folderId.description: Box folder ID ('0' is the root folder)

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Search for files and folders across the Box account

query.description: Search string to match against item names and content

ancestor_folder_ids.description: Comma-separated folder IDs to scope the search to

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

tools.name: Create Folder
tools.description: Create a new folder inside a Box parent folder

parent.description: Parent folder reference, e.g. { "id": "0" } for the root folder

tools.name: List File Comments
tools.description: List comments on a Box file

offset.description: Number of comments to skip for pagination

tools.name: Add Comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Box file

prompts.title: Browse my files
prompts.prompt: List the files and folders in my Box root folder.

prompts.title: Find a file
prompts.prompt: Search my Box account for a file by name and show its details.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Box OAuth Setup

steps.title: Create a Box app
steps.description: Sign in at https://app.box.com/developers/console (a free Individual Box account works) and create a Custom App with 'User Authentication (OAuth 2.0)'.

steps.title: Configure the redirect URI and scopes
steps.description: In the app's Configuration tab, add your redirect URI ending in /api/auth/box/callback and enable the 'Read and write all files and folders' application scope.

steps.title: Copy credentials
steps.description: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret from the Configuration tab into BOX_CLIENT_ID and BOX_CLIENT_SECRET.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Connect your Box account and run the List Folder Items tool against folder 0.

notes: Authorization codes are only valid for 30 seconds; the client is authenticated with client_id/client_secret in the token request body
Refresh tokens are issued; access tokens are short-lived and refreshed automatically
File upload is not included: Box uploads go to upload.box.com and require multipart/form-data with a file part, which this connector's JSON endpoint executor does not support yet
